content:
Season ends with Anthony trying to stop using drugs.

Mary is on the couch alone. She receives a text.

Cut to Anthony sending text. Cuts back and forth between them texting.

A: I need to stop doing drugs. It doesn’t make me feel good anymore.

M: You stopping using drugs is really and truly an shitty imposition on my life.

A: On your life? How?

M: Now I have to smoke alone. Sober people never hang out with non sober people. Its a lifestyle. You don’t hang out at a strip club if you’re a celibate.

A: Well you probably do.

M: Probably.

A: We didn’t meet because of drugs. We met at school, then slowly found out we both smoke. I enjoy other things then getting high.

M: Who are you kidding? High is high…er.

Next season opens with Anthony trying to bring a sober friend to hang out with Mary. Their relationship is strained.

Marshalls
context: From document: Web Sitcom Ideas — chunk 2 (chunk 2/798)
